description: Scan History view (ported to testCases schema 2026-06-05). Opens Scan History from the home top-bar 'View Scan History' button, then returns home. Action-only: the View Scan History click resolves the history screen; Back returns home. Read-only. Verified against live UI 2026-06-05 (Back button present on the history screen).

testCases.title: Open Scan History from home and return
